meaning: n.[医] 呼吸运动计量法
examples: Respirometry is very widely used to characterize the activated sludge system and to control its operation in wastewater treatment plant.
The results provide basic data for monitoring, modelling and controlling the dynamic process of nitrification by respirometry-titrimetry.
The nitrification inhibition by substrate and it's kinetic model in nitrifying granules were investigated by using a batch respirometry test.
